testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling returns the correct HTTP status code from an HttpException
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling returns the correct HTTP status code from an HttpException

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling serialises a string HttpException response correctly
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling serialises a string HttpException response correctly

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling serialises an object HttpException response — string message field
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling serialises an object HttpException response — string message field

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling joins array message fields with a semicolon
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling joins array message fields with a semicolon

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling includes the request path in the error envelope
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling includes the request path in the error envelope

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling includes a timestamp in the error envelope
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling includes a timestamp in the error envelope

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling reads correlationId from req.correlationId when present
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling reads correlationId from req.correlationId when present

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling falls back to x-correlation-id header when req.correlationId is absent
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling falls back to x-correlation-id header when req.correlationId is absent

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling sets correlationId to null when neither source is present
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter HttpException handling sets correlationId to null when neither source is present

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns 500 for a plain Error
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns 500 for a plain Error

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns "Internal Server Error" message for any unhandled exception
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns "Internal Server Error" message for any unhandled exception

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling handles a non-Error thrown value (string)
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling handles a non-Error thrown value (string)

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling does not leak error details in production mode
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling does not leak error details in production mode

testcase.classname: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns 500 status code in production mode
testcase.name: AllExceptionsFilter non-HttpException handling returns 500 status code in production mode

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is set
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is set

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is not set (graceful degradation)
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is not set (graceful degradation)

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor initialises client without auth header when apiKey is not set
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor initialises client without auth header when apiKey is not set

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when client is not initialised (no baseURL)
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when client is not initialised (no baseURL)

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns true when /health GET succeeds
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns true when /health GET succeeds

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when /health GET throws
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when /health GET throws

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() returns data and correlationId from response
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() returns data and correlationId from response

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() returns null correlationId when header is absent
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() returns null correlationId when header is absent

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() throws when client is not initialised
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() throws when client is not initialised

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() returns data and correlationId from response
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() returns data and correlationId from response

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() returns null correlationId when header is absent
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() returns null correlationId when header is absent

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() throws when client is not initialised
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() throws when client is not initialised

testcase.classname: HealthService should be defined
testcase.name: HealthService should be defined

testcase.classname: HealthService returns ok when both checks pass
testcase.name: HealthService returns ok when both checks pass

testcase.classname: HealthService returns degraded when database fails but apiCenter passes
testcase.name: HealthService returns degraded when database fails but apiCenter passes

testcase.classname: HealthService returns degraded when apiCenter fails but database passes
testcase.name: HealthService returns degraded when apiCenter fails but database passes

testcase.classname: HealthService returns error when both checks fail
testcase.name: HealthService returns error when both checks fail

testcase.classname: AppController root should return service info
testcase.name: AppController root should return service info

testcase.classname: AppService should be defined
testcase.name: AppService should be defined

testcase.classname: AppService getServiceInfo returns the correct service name
testcase.name: AppService getServiceInfo returns the correct service name

testcase.classname: AppService getServiceInfo returns the correct version
testcase.name: AppService getServiceInfo returns the correct version

testcase.classname: AppService getServiceInfo returns an object with both service and version keys
testcase.name: AppService getServiceInfo returns an object with both service and version keys

testcase.classname: HealthController should be defined
testcase.name: HealthController should be defined

testcase.classname: HealthController returns 200 with ok payload when both checks pass
testcase.name: HealthController returns 200 with ok payload when both checks pass

testcase.classname: HealthController returns 200 with degraded payload when one check fails
testcase.name: HealthController returns 200 with degraded payload when one check fails

testcase.classname: HealthController throws HttpException 503 when both checks fail
testcase.name: HealthController throws HttpException 503 when both checks fail

testcase.classname: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient should be defined
testcase.name: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient should be defined

testcase.classname: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient creates a Supabase client when both URL and key are provided
testcase.name: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient creates a Supabase client when both URL and key are provided

testcase.classname: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when URL is missing
testcase.name: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when URL is missing

testcase.classname: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when key is missing
testcase.name: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when key is missing

testcase.classname: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when both URL and key are missing
testcase.name: SupabaseService onModuleInit / getClient leaves client null when both URL and key are missing

testcase.classname: SupabaseService ping() returns false immediately when client is null
testcase.name: SupabaseService ping() returns false immediately when client is null

testcase.classname: SupabaseService ping() returns true when listUsers resolves without error
testcase.name: SupabaseService ping() returns true when listUsers resolves without error

testcase.classname: SupabaseService ping() returns false when listUsers resolves with an error object
testcase.name: SupabaseService ping() returns false when listUsers resolves with an error object

testcase.classname: SupabaseService ping() returns false when listUsers throws
testcase.name: SupabaseService ping() returns false when listUsers throws

testcase.classname: SupabaseService ping() returns false when the 3-second timeout fires before listUsers resolves
testcase.name: SupabaseService ping() returns false when the 3-second timeout fires before listUsers resolves

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path returns a fully typed config object for a valid env
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path returns a fully typed config object for a valid env

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path accepts production as NODE_ENV
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path accepts production as NODE_ENV

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path accepts test as NODE_ENV
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path accepts test as NODE_ENV

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path includes optional API_CENTER_BASE_URL when provided
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path includes optional API_CENTER_BASE_URL when provided

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path includes optional API_CENTER_API_KEY when provided
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path includes optional API_CENTER_API_KEY when provided

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path omits API_CENTER_BASE_URL from result when not set
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path omits API_CENTER_BASE_URL from result when not set

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path defaults ENABLE_SWAGGER to "false" when not set
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path defaults ENABLE_SWAGGER to "false" when not set

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path uses the provided ENABLE_SWAGGER value when set
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path uses the provided ENABLE_SWAGGER value when set

testcase.classname: validateEnv happy path trims leading/trailing whitespace from string values
testcase.name: validateEnv happy path trims leading/trailing whitespace from string values

testcase.classname: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws for an invalid NODE_ENV value
testcase.name: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws for an invalid NODE_ENV value

testcase.classname: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws when NODE_ENV is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws when NODE_ENV is missing

testcase.classname: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws when NODE_ENV is an empty string
testcase.name: validateEnv NODE_ENV validation throws when NODE_ENV is an empty string

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is missing

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is zero
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is zero

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is above 65535
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is above 65535

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is not a number
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation throws when PORT is not a number

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation accepts PORT at boundary value 1
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation accepts PORT at boundary value 1

testcase.classname: validateEnv PORT validation accepts PORT at boundary value 65535
testcase.name: validateEnv PORT validation accepts PORT at boundary value 65535

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is missing

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is an empty string
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is an empty string

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is whitespace only
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_URL is whitespace only

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is missing

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is an empty string

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is whitespace only
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is whitespace only

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is missing

testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is whitespace only

testcase.classname: validateEnv required string fields throws when ALLOWED_ORIGINS is missing
testcase.name: validateEnv required string fields throws when ALLOWED_ORIGINS is missing

testcase.classname: validateEnv optional field warnings does not throw when API_CENTER_API_KEY is missing

testcase.classname: BODY_SIZE_LIMIT is defined
testcase.name: BODY_SIZE_LIMIT is defined

testcase.classname: BODY_SIZE_LIMIT equals "5mb"
testcase.name: BODY_SIZE_LIMIT equals "5mb"

testcase.classname: helmetConfig is defined
testcase.name: helmetConfig is defined

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has contentSecurityPolicy with defaultSrc self-only
testcase.name: helmetConfig has contentSecurityPolicy with defaultSrc self-only

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has scriptSrc restricted to self
testcase.name: helmetConfig has scriptSrc restricted to self

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has frameAncestors set to none (clickjacking protection)
testcase.name: helmetConfig has frameAncestors set to none (clickjacking protection)

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has objectSrc set to none
testcase.name: helmetConfig has objectSrc set to none

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has hsts maxAge of 1 year (31536000)
testcase.name: helmetConfig has hsts maxAge of 1 year (31536000)

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has hsts includeSubDomains enabled
testcase.name: helmetConfig has hsts includeSubDomains enabled

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has hsts preload enabled
testcase.name: helmetConfig has hsts preload enabled

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has noSniff enabled
testcase.name: helmetConfig has noSniff enabled

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has referrerPolicy set to no-referrer
testcase.name: helmetConfig has referrerPolicy set to no-referrer

testcase.classname: helmetConfig has frameguard disabled (using CSP frame-ancestors instead)
testcase.name: helmetConfig has frameguard disabled (using CSP frame-ancestors instead)

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger is defined
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger is defined

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger allows unsafe-inline scripts (required by Swagger UI)
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger allows unsafe-inline scripts (required by Swagger UI)

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger allows unsafe-inline styles (required by Swagger UI)
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger allows unsafe-inline styles (required by Swagger UI)

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger still enforces frameAncestors none
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger still enforces frameAncestors none

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger still has hsts enabled
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger still has hsts enabled

testcase.classname: helmetConfigSwagger still has noSniff enabled
testcase.name: helmetConfigSwagger still has noSniff enabled

testcase.classname: corsOptions allows a whitelisted origin
testcase.name: corsOptions allows a whitelisted origin

testcase.classname: corsOptions allows a second whitelisted origin
testcase.name: corsOptions allows a second whitelisted origin

testcase.classname: corsOptions rejects an origin not in the whitelist
testcase.name: corsOptions rejects an origin not in the whitelist

testcase.classname: corsOptions allows requests with no origin (server-to-server / health probes)
testcase.name: corsOptions allows requests with no origin (server-to-server / health probes)

testcase.classname: corsOptions rejects all origins when allowedOriginsEnv is empty string
testcase.name: corsOptions rejects all origins when allowedOriginsEnv is empty string

testcase.classname: corsOptions rejects all browser origins when allowedOriginsEnv is undefined
testcase.name: corsOptions rejects all browser origins when allowedOriginsEnv is undefined

testcase.classname: corsOptions trims whitespace around origin entries
testcase.name: corsOptions trims whitespace around origin entries

testcase.classname: corsOptions includes credentials: true
testcase.name: corsOptions includes credentials: true

testcase.classname: corsOptions exposes X-Request-Id header
testcase.name: corsOptions exposes X-Request-Id header

testcase.classname: corsOptions includes standard HTTP methods
testcase.name: corsOptions includes standard HTTP methods

testcase.classname: corsOptions includes Authorization in allowedHeaders
testcase.name: corsOptions includes Authorization in allowedHeaders

testcase.classname: corsOptions sets maxAge to 86400 (24h preflight cache)
testcase.name: corsOptions sets maxAge to 86400 (24h preflight cache)

testcase.classname: corsOptions does not allow a prefix-matched subdomain attack
testcase.name: corsOptions does not allow a prefix-matched subdomain attack

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware should be defined
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware should be defined

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid attaches the sanitized id to req.correlationId
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid attaches the sanitized id to req.correlationId

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid echoes the id in the X-Correlation-ID response header
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid echoes the id in the X-Correlation-ID response header

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid calls next()
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is present and valid calls next()

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent generates a UUID and assigns it to req.correlationId
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent generates a UUID and assigns it to req.correlationId

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent sets the generated id in the X-Correlation-ID response header
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent sets the generated id in the X-Correlation-ID response header

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent calls next()
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware when x-correlation-id header is absent calls next()

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization strips characters outside alphanumeric, hyphen, and underscore
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization strips characters outside alphanumeric, hyphen, and underscore

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization truncates ids longer than 128 characters to exactly 128
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization truncates ids longer than 128 characters to exactly 128

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization falls back to a generated UUID when the sanitized result is empty
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization falls back to a generated UUID when the sanitized result is empty

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization accepts a valid UUID as-is
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization accepts a valid UUID as-is

testcase.classname: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization handles an array-valued header by falling back to a new UUID
testcase.name: CorrelationIdMiddleware sanitization handles an array-valued header by falling back to a new UUID
